jobQueryRequest.query: SELECT r.name, SUM(ol.amount) AS revenue FROM sales.order_line ol JOIN sales.sales_order so ON ol.order_id = so.order_id JOIN sales.customer c ON so.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN sales.country co ON c.country_id = co.country_id JOIN sales.region r ON co.region_id = r.region_id GROUP BY r.name

SELECT pl.name, SUM(ol.amount) AS revenue FROM sales.order_line ol JOIN sales.product p ON ol.product_id = p.product_id JOIN sales.product_line pl ON p.product_line_id = pl.product_line_id GROUP BY pl.name

SELECT s.name, a.name, SUM(ol.amount) AS revenue FROM sales.order_line ol JOIN sales.product p ON ol.product_id = p.product_id JOIN sales.product_line pl ON p.product_line_id = pl.product_line_id JOIN sales.segment s ON pl.segment_id = s.segment_id JOIN sales.architecture a ON pl.architecture_id = a.architecture_id GROUP BY s.name, a.name

SELECT fp.fiscal_year, SUM(ol.amount) AS revenue FROM sales.order_line ol JOIN sales.sales_order so ON ol.order_id = so.order_id JOIN sales.fiscal_period fp ON so.fiscal_period_id = fp.fiscal_period_id GROUP BY fp.fiscal_year

SELECT i.name, SUM(ol.amount) AS revenue FROM sales.order_line ol JOIN sales.sales_order so ON ol.order_id = so.order_id JOIN sales.customer c ON so.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN sales.industry i ON c.industry_id = i.industry_id GROUP BY i.name

SELECT r.name, SUM(ol.amount) AS revenue FROM sales.order_line ol JOIN sales.sales_order so ON ol.order_id = so.order_id JOIN sales.customer c ON so.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN sales.country co ON c.country_id = co.country_id JOIN sales.region r ON co.region_id = r.region_id WHERE r.name = 'EMEA' GROUP BY r.name
SELECT i.fiscal_year, i.revenue, SUM(h.employee_count) AS headcount FROM main.income_statement i JOIN main.headcount h ON i.fiscal_year = h.fiscal_year GROUP BY i.fiscal_year, i.revenue
